en.seo.title: Story chapters
en.story.title: A story that remains readable without imagery
en.story.one.title: Start with materials
en.story.one.body: We document the origin, handling and intended use of every material before it reaches the workshop.
en.story.two.title: Finish with care
en.story.two.body: Each finished object carries clear service information so people can choose it with confidence.
